note: Per-neighborhood registry. PRIVATE repo: raw URLs require the fetcher's GitHub auth; the canonical access path is the authenticated clone at ~/.brainstem/neighborhoods/rapp-batcave/clone (batcave mount). sha256 pins let loaders verify streamed files against this manifest.

agents.name: @kody-w/batcave
agents.purpose: Participate in the batcave: join/browse/stash/load/show_and_tell/sync — the cubby contract.

verification._instructions: Re-compute sha256(file) for anything you stream and compare before installing.
